headline: SIGNAL SCAN — May 7, 2026
telegramText: SIGNAL SCAN — May 7, 2026 SNAPSHOT Risk-on surge driven by crypto institutional mania and Iran truce optimism, with BTC breaching $82K on massive ETF inflows.
